item.title: How to respond to haters
item.description: #rhm #haters_gonna_hate #diving #athlete For those wondering, the cellulite is on her butt... so, rather than getting banned, I did not post a picture of it.

item.title: An annular eclipse in a tree's shade.
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: Dumpin' memes, Closing tabs pt 2 ft forced eye contact
item.description:
Gentle reminder to take your meds and hydrate. The rain in Spain falls mainly on the *checks notes* Southwestern coast of Australia? That can't be right...
She NEEDS! GIVE her! *gasp!* So beautiful!
I just want it running in the background so I can take my turn here and there in between other activities without having to dedicate myself to sitting down for two hours and booting up the game. I want to play a Huge Real Location Earth map with as many civs as possible, domination only, no turn limit, and keep it going as l can. When I find cities that were settled by conquered civs, I come in and liberate them to their founders, bringing them back into the game. I seek global hegemony, but with peace. In the end a tremendous amount of my industry just goes to global warming mitigation through CO2 capture. Gandhi doesn't know WHAT to do with me. This kind of game is not quick.
I think... no matter what I do, the trolley is going to turn back toward the guy pushing it. Who I think is supposed to be Sisyphus? So yeah, Dad. I'm winning.
Jimmy.something you've created a true work of art here. You should be proud of yourself.
*licks lips*
I could listen to this all day.
This guy revolutionized puppet theater. We've lost a master of the arts, people.
It's ok to just look at the pictures.
Stacy, did you shoot this hole in the raft? Be honest with me.
If you're mean to this frog, I will be unhappy with you.
I'm flickering back and forth between 5 and 7.
I prefer the rain. Sunshine is good, and enjoyable. But a downpour will make me grin.
^ me at the sun. What are you up to, you fusion-powered bitch? Simultaneously sustaining and threatening all surface-dwelling life on earth? I know you're up to something...
QUASO Gah! Look at that lil cutie!
Some of these are much harder for me to realize than others.
Hmm...
I mean, that seems like a rad idea to me. I think global chocolate production is under threat from climate change, though.
I want to try whatever Bosch was on when he was painting.
And to have this person provide the musical accompaniment.
And to have an opossum to bap.
I'd be borb 2.0 if I only knew what shoegaze is (don't tell me.) So instead I'm hamfriend.
I'm pretty good at math, therefore I can't be a writer.
I think being good is sometimes easier than being kind, even though they should almost always be the same thing.
Scootn
Not by choice.
Dance off to save the universe!
Do not argue with the toe beans.
Go off, queen.
Lawful good?
If that's doomed, I don't want to be saved.
You found that in just an HOUR? And they gave you a discount?! Way to go, babe!
Feelings don't care about your facts.
I have planted a potato in some soil I harvested from a nearby hill. It's in a large water bottle. I need to remember to water it. We'll see how it goes.
But what's in your pants? DOOM! *heavy metal music begins*
Let's be honest here. That's just too many cooks.
Apocalypse cat is best cat. I need to know what Air BNB this is so I can make sure I hit it when I do the Appalachian trail.
And also, if you kill him he just comes back to life in 3 days unlike YOUR gods who just, like, STAY dead! And he has the infinite food glitch, and, and, and he'll wash your feet!
They really are, aren't they?
I might be dillying, I might be dallying. *points to my mustache* This ain't sayin'. And with this, forget it. *puts on sunglasses* Am I mad at you? Am I about to help you find an Arby's? You don't know.
Born to eat flowers. Forced to make eye contact. No, wait; the opposite.
Listen to your gut, but maybe take it with a grain of salt or get a second opinion.
I love muffins all the time. I only need a stud when I'm trying to hang a picture on the wall.
Dumbass, lazy POS. WHAT ARE YOU DOING, INFANT ME?! Figuring out object permanence?!!! Get with the program.
Why is this the favorite song of every pet bird? What do they know that we don't?
Do your thing, you qwest-sprout-looking weirdo.
When young, they don't yet have all the floof. Therefore, pointy.
You have aged.
You chose to make eye contact with me, man. I was just trying to get to Victory Road and you did your dramatic fucking turn at the last possible second, so here we are. Apologize to your poor little Bidoof for getting it into this entirely avoidable situation. Groudon. Use earthquake. GG noob.
Unforgiveable.
hehehe
And I can't figure out what tab it's on, so I can't even begin to try to control it.
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne

item.title: You don't choose a cat, a cat chooses you.
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: I made a chameleon of of old computer parts
item.description:
He weighed over 20kg and was almost 1m long!
If you wanna see how I made him, or any of the other stuff I’ve built, feel free to check out my YouTube! I’m currently working on a series showing the entire build process! Chameleon build: https://youtu.be/sRu4538GR9w?si=JgFNoymZUd2dCFqa YouTube: https://youtube.com/@zakmiskrysculpture?si=JzZChgm5alHQsm75 Let me know what you guys think!
item.dc:creator: zakmiskry

item.title: Once in a lifetime bottom shelf memes.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Back to doing what I love best. Roasting wieners over an open fire.
Just out here getting a mild sunburn waiting to witness the eclipse.
Taxi Bear tax. Titled: "But, MOM."
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Phone clearing dump (mostly gaming memes)
item.description:
1. Imagine putting this on YouTube today
2
3. Which game actually has And You?
4. Those were the days
5. Wait is this background real?!
6
7
8. Bro is dead
9. Who wants a PS2?
10
11
12. Same
13. When my best friends ask me if I want to play games together
14.
15. Game devs: "Soon, I swear!" If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P. S. Have a great week and awesome and don't forget to hydrate and take care of yourself. Go on for a walk it helps with mental health! : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: 11 Years on Imgur Happy Cake Day with a message that kept me going through some hard times
item.description: Last few years have been tough; both parents nearly dying from a multitude of illnesses (They're oldies), being out of work and the collapse of my marriage. Now both my folks are back at home and doing well, got a great job, buying myself a house, regained the freedom to be myself again and be the greatest dad to my kids, and currently seeing someone that is simply amazing. Just keep going. Keep fighting. Never give up. Love to you all
item.dc:creator: watfordlad

item.title: Free games for those of you who want them
item.description: Yes, it's Epic Games. And tiny octopus knows some of you have an issue with them. But for those of us who don't, The Outer Worlds is a fun romp and Thief is just so good. And they're free. Thanks y'all. Tiny octopus now returns you to your staring at a white wall and trying to blink away the afterimage of the eclipse after you accidentally looked at it because someone stole your glasses and the totality blinked back at you.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Someone please save the cheerleader!
item.description:
The last solar eclipse was 7 years ago, given the events since then I can only assume nobody saved the cheerleader.
Please, someone, save the cheerleader today.

item.dc:creator: Trelfar

item.title: 15 years of student loan payments, finally paid off.
item.description: It's shameless, so feel free to downvote me into oblivion, but I'm happy about something I've achieved for the first time in quite a long while. I'm lucky to have studied before the UK's big tuition fee spike so I'm aware I had things easier than a lot of people, but I'm still proud of it. Onwards to new and exciting types of long term debt, I guess.
item.dc:creator: ActuallyMadeOfCheese

item.title: Some people just go above and beyond

item.title: Ramen Dump
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: My father builds wooden model ships
item.dc:creator: DoomaTheMoonMan

item.title: I had a bad day
item.description:
I haven't been drinking much lately. When I do it's controlled.
I don't remember deciding Sunday is a day I will make a mess of and get myself fucked up
But I did both. I had started my day very well, up early, cleaning and organizing played with the dog and was grooming him before I vacuumed. Even put on a new anime so I could work
But I knew I had a few shots ... for some reason. Didn't eat breakfast. I was kinda mad at my family and I didn't stop drinking.
Before long I was doing the porcelain hug, sleeping on the bathroom floor and locked the door so no one could find me
I miss my dad. I wish my mom wasn't mean to me. I'm stressed about selling the house and moving.
I didn't expect to destroy myself so efficiently. Ah well
Sweet husband could have used my help packing our furniture
I was able to eat dinner and went back to sleep
I drank lots of juice and don't feel like complete trash this morning
Ugh, I guess it was coming up on "Big upset" time a while now
I might have broken my finger. Hurts at the joint with a sharp pain.
I think I cleaned up everything tho
Off to work soon. Probably an angry music day. And I'll wait for my partner to set tasks
I'll look into hero journey tonight. I'm awful st discord, and don't know if it'll work with my steam deck, but that last therapist was Hella unprofessional
Psychiatrist I saved will get a call today
Found lots of VHS tapes in dads collection to watch
I almost listened to all his CDs. He has both good and goofy taste in music, lol
The tapes are so I can find any family videos he recorded
They are buried treasures
item.dc:creator: flyingmonkychild
